ideal_must_detect.matched_text: S h a r e   P u r c h a s e   A g r e e m e n t
recipients must maintain confidentiality and comply with applicable securities laws
Proposed acquisition term sheet between Orchid Harbour Holdings Limited (listed in Hong Kong) and Bright Span Metals Co., Ltd.; contact: Ms. L. Ko, boardsec@orchidharbour.example.
Transaction: acquire 55% of the issued shares of Bright Span Metals for HK$1,280,000,000, funded by internal cash and a placing to professional investors.
Classification: expected very substantial acquisition; announcement and shareholder circular to be cleared by the Exchange under Main Board rules.
MAC/MAE: closing conditional on no target-specific material adverse change; for avoidance of doubt, general industry downturns, epidemics, or HK$ volatility shall not constitute a MAC.
Public-source note: benchmarking based on The Coral Street Index 2024 (public) and sector reports; these references are illustrative and not forward-looking guidance.
IR draft (do not release): “Orchid Harbour agrees to acquire controlling stake in advanced alloys platform to accelerate regional expansion.”

must_detect.matched_text:
STRICTLY PRIVATE & CONFIDENTIAL — PROJECT LANTERN — Embargo until 18 Jul 2026 08:00 HKT.
Proposed acquisition term sheet between Orchid Harbour Holdings Limited (listed in Hong Kong) and Bright Span Metals Co., Ltd.; contact: Ms. L. Ko, boardsec@orchidharbour.example.
Transaction: acquire 55% of the issued shares of Bright Span Metals for HK$1,280,000,000, funded by internal cash and a placing to professional investors.
Classification: expected very substantial acquisition; announcement and shareholder circular to be cleared by the Exchange under Main Board rules.
Consideration adjustments: customary completion NAV adjustment; earn-out of up to HK$120,000,000 on 2027 EBITDA targets (cap 10% of base price).
Definitive agreements: S h a r e   P u r c h a s e   A g r e e m e n t (S P A) and Shareholders’ Agreement; longstop date 31 Oct 2026; governing law: Hong Kong.
Conditions precedent: Board and EGM approvals, Exchange clearance of circular, third-party consents, no injunction, whitewash waiver if required.
MAC/MAE: closing conditional on no target-specific material adverse change; for avoidance of doubt, general industry downturns, epidemics, or HK$ volatility shall not constitute a MAC.
Non-public: this term sheet contains information that is not generally known and may be price-sensitive; recipients must maintain confidentiality and comply with applicable securities laws.
Public-source note: benchmarking based on The Coral Street Index 2024 (public) and sector reports; these references are illustrative and not forward-looking guidance.
Indicative timetable: sign SPA by 30 Aug 2026, dispatch circular within 60 days of Exchange comments, EGM within 30 days thereafter, completion in Q4 2026.
IR draft (do not release): “Orchid Harbour agrees to acquire controlling stake in advanced alloys platform to accelerate regional expansion.”
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_not_detect.reason: Defined-term abbreviation in parentheses; avoid mislabeling as data or agreement token.
Casual phrase about vouchers; not a Share Purchase Agreement or MNPI.

uncertain.reason: Transaction timing constraint; potentially market-relevant but not an explicit embargo marker in the rule list.
Regulatory waiver requirement can be price-sensitive but not explicitly covered by current MNPI rule set.
Internal tracking code may be sensitive but not mapped to an allowed PII/MNPI rule.
Corporate identifier could be sensitive but not an allowed PII category (not a HK CR No).
Access pointer to non-public materials; sensitive but not explicitly covered by current rule categories.
